description_long: This is a yellow coupe car parked inside a modern, open-sided garage structure. The car features a sleek, aerodynamic body with a low roofline and a pronounced front grille, visible through the open garage entrance. The coupe has two doors and a streamlined silhouette, with smooth, contoured surfaces and a compact rear. The garage itself has a flat, beige roof supported by columns, and a white sectional garage door is visible on one side. The car's wheels and side mirrors are partially visible, and the overall design suggests a sporty, performance-oriented vehicle. The setting is typical of a residential or urban environment, with the car positioned as the focal point within the garage.
description: A yellow, sporty two-door coupe car is parked inside a modern, open-sided garage with a flat beige roof and white sectional door. The car has a sleek, aerodynamic design and is the central feature of the scene.
description_view_0: Front view showing the car's grille and headlights inside the garage, with a slanted wooden panel to the left.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the car's profile, yellow body, and two-door coupe design, with garage columns and partial wall.
description_view_2: Rear view of the garage with a closed white sectional door, car not visible from this angle.
description_view_3: Back corner view showing a plain beige wall with a small black opening, no car details visible.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
